summary: Completed testing of ManoBank compliance service, auth, dashboard, and employee portal (Iteration 17). All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend employee login portal with 2FA verification flow works correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/manobank/admin/dashboard - Returns employee info, stats, pending items, loans
GET /api/compliance/summary - Returns entity info (ManoBank S.A., CIF B19427723, Banco de España)
GET /api/compliance/policies - Returns 6 policies (KYC, AML, DRP/BCP, Risk, Incident Response, Sanctions)
GET /api/manobank/admin/loans - Returns loans list with loan details
POST /api/auth/2fa/send-code - Sends 2FA code via Twilio SMS
Frontend: /banco employee login page loads correctly
Frontend: Login form with email/password inputs works
Frontend: 2FA verification step shows after successful credentials
Frontend: Code validity timer and resend cooldown work
critical_code_review_comments: Compliance service properly creates immutable audit logs with cryptographic hashes
Auth routes have proper rate limiting and account lockout after failed attempts
2FA via Twilio SMS is working - real SMS sent to Director's phone
Dashboard correctly shows employee info, stats, and pending items
Compliance policies are properly loaded from /app/backend/policies/ directory
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing Director account
context_for_next_testing_agent: ManoBank compliance service and employee portal tested. All APIs working correctly. Login with Director credentials works, 2FA sends real SMS via Twilio to +34601510950. Compliance summary shows entity info and audit stats. 6 compliance policies available. Dashboard shows employee info, customer/account stats, and pending items.
